name: Augusta County
description_short: Augusta County Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving the Verona, VA area with savings accounts, personal loans, and VISA debit card services.
description_long:
Augusta County Federal Credit Union (ACFCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union located in Verona, Virginia, operating under NCUA insurance. The organization is governed by a board of directors composed primarily of retired Augusta County government and school employees, suggesting deep community roots and local accountability.

ACFCU offers a full range of consumer financial services including share savings accounts, share draft accounts (checking), VISA debit cards, and various loan products. Their loan menu includes auto loans (new and used vehicles), home improvement loans, debt consolidation, vacation loans, emergency loans, and tax loans. Members can access loan calculators, view current rates, and apply for payroll deduction repayment plans. The credit union also provides ancillary services such as depositor's insurance, direct deposit, credit reports, VISA gift cards, and an ATM locator tool.

ACFCU distinguishes itself through competitive interest rates calculated on unpaid balances, no early payoff penalties, and flexible repayment terms using payroll deduction when available. Loan eligibility is transparently based on ability to repay, considering debt ratio and credit history. The institution maintains a small, accessible staff with clear organizational structure including a manager, assistant manager, and dedicated loan officers.

As a small local credit union, ACFCU has inherent limitations typical of community-focused institutions: limited geographic footprint, smaller loan portfolios compared to regional or national alternatives, and fewer technological conveniences than larger financial institutions. However, for members within their service area seeking personalized lending and relationship-based banking, the organization appears to deliver consistent value with transparent pricing and no hidden charges.
services: Share draft accounts (checking) with debit cards
VISA debit cards with mobile app
pros: Competitive interest rates compared to other institutions, calculated on unpaid balance
No penalties or hidden charges for early loan payoffs
Flexible repayment plans with payroll deduction available
VISA debit card with free mobile app for card management and protection
Transparent loan eligibility criteria based on debt ratio and credit history
Local, community-focused institution with board members tied to Augusta County
Multiple loan products available (auto, home improvement, debt consolidation, emergency)
cons: Limited geographic service area (Verona, VA location only—no apparent branch expansion)
Very small staff may result in slower loan processing or limited availability
No mention of online loan application or digital banking features beyond login
Limited information about savings rates, CD terms, or deposit product competitiveness
No mention of business lending, investment services, or wealth management offerings
best_for: Augusta County employees and residents seeking relationship-based, personalized lending
Borrowers prioritizing transparent pricing and no-penalty early payoff terms
Members wanting to support a local, community-focused financial institution
Individuals needing flexible repayment options through payroll deduction
diagnosis: Augusta County Federal Credit Union is best suited for residents and employees of Augusta County, Virginia seeking a local, transparent, relationship-based alternative to larger banks, with particular appeal to borrowers who value competitive rates and no early payoff penalties. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—membership and branch access are restricted to the Verona, VA area, and online/digital banking capabilities appear minimal compared to regional credit unions.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
